---
title: "Shiny example"
format: html
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(shiny)

ds <- read_csv("data/fruits_long.csv")

```

```{r}
#| panel: sidebar
#| echo: true

selectInput(
  "diet", "Diet type:",
  choices = unique(ds$diet_type)
)

```

```{r}
#| echo: true

plotOutput("mychart")

```

```{r}
#| context: server

output$mychart <- renderPlot({
  ds |>
    
    filter(diet_type == input$diet) |>
    
    count(fruit) |>
    mutate(fruit=fct_reorder(fruit, n)) |> 
    
    ggplot(aes(x = fruit, y = n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Fruit", y = "Count")
})
```
